transcript: Speaker A: Ise English me? [What is this in English?] Speaker B: One wolf. Speaker A: Aur ise? [And this?] Speaker B: Many wolves. Speaker A: Good. Aacha ise kya kehte hain? [Good. Okay, what is this called?] Speaker B: One sheep. Speaker A: Aur ise? [And this?] Speaker B: Many sheeps. Speaker A: Nahi, ise many sheeps nahi, many sheep hi kahenge. [No, this is not many sheeps, it's just many sheep.] Speaker B: Kya? Wo kaise? [What? How's that?] Speaker A: Kyunki animals jaise ki sheep, deer, fish ka plural aur singular same hi hota hai. [Because animals like sheep, deer, fish have the same plural and singular form.] Speaker B: Oh... theek hai theek hai. Mujhe English ache se nahi aati. [Oh... okay okay. I don't know English very well.] Speaker A: Koi problem nahi. AI teachers try kiya? [No problem. Have you tried AI teachers?] Speaker B: Par woh toh mehenge hote honge na? [But they must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isliye 1 crore se zyada log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why more than 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaoge. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Speaker B: Wow! Phir kaise join karu? [Wow! Then how do I join?] Speaker A: Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sign up karo aur practice start karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao! [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. In just 15 days, you will start seeing improvement. Come on, get started!] Speaker C: Install Now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]

[is the same.], ache se nahi aati. [don't know well.], AI teachers, Par woh toh mehenge [But they must be expensive], Normal English, classes se 7 guna [7 times than classes], sasta hai, [is cheaper,], par English practice [practicing English], Par time nahi [But no time], minute ki practice [minutes of practice], kaafi hai. [is enough.], Bilkul confident [Completely confident], button dabao [press button], practice start, Sirf 15 dino mein [In just 15 days], Shuru ho jao! summary: An AI robot avatar corrects a young man's English plural grammar in a split-screen format. The AI addresses common barriers like high costs and lack of time, promoting MySivi as an affordable, quick daily solution. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app from the Play Store.
